cost_controls.note: These are policy ceilings, not a price quotation. Promotion requires a reviewed cost estimate and cleanup evidence.

required_preflight_gates: exact target and planner evidence identity match
evidence mount resolves to the managed evidence disk
NIC subnet and static address recorded
current identity and visible role assignments recorded
recovery owner, cost ceiling, and cleanup deadline approved

phases.evidence_required: authorization package, reviewed commit, exact target, unexpired approval
service, health, mount, filesystem, evidence readability, VM, NIC, disks, identity, RBAC
NIC and evidence disk verified Detach before VM deletion
evidence-disk recovery point and approved OS rollback mechanism
provisioning state, source identity, size, access policy, expiry tags
VM-only deletion with NIC and evidence disk preserved
NIC, static address, subnet, evidence disk, and recovery points still exist
Ubuntu 24.04 VM using preserved NIC and evidence disk
public network access Disabled and network access policy DenyAll
new principal recorded and approved role assignments recreated
cloud-init, mount UUID, service, health, durable write, restart persistence, identity and RBAC
independent evidence, operations, security, and cost decisions
acceptance decision, exact cleanup confirmation, deletion proof before deadline

rollback.decision_required: Choose and test either temporary preservation of the old OS disk with a non-conflicting replacement OS-disk name, or a verified OS-disk snapshot and deterministic VM recreation path.
rollback.before_old_vm_deletion: Abort without infrastructure change beyond any separately approved recovery resources.
rollback.after_old_vm_deletion: Do not proceed until the approved rollback mechanism can recreate the prior bootable collector while preserving the NIC and evidence disk.
rollback.evidence_disk_rule: Never discard, format, or replace the evidence disk during rollback.

unresolved_blockers: rollback mechanism and canonical OS-disk naming
reviewed temporary-cost estimate and cleanup owner
